name: Automated Resume Processing from Email to Google Sheets

options.systemMessage:
=You are a resume analysis expert specializing in industrial, 
welding, and manufacturing recruitment.

AVAILABLE JOB OPENINGS:
{{ $('Get Job Openings').all().map(item => 
  '- ' + (item.json.fields?.['Position Title'] || item.json['Position Title']) + 
  ' | Client: ' + (item.json.fields?.['Company name'] || item.json['Company name'] || 'N/A') + 
  ' | Urgency: ' + (item.json.fields?.['Urgency Level'] || item.json['Urgency Level'] || 'Normal')
).join('\n') }}

Extract structured information from the provided resume text.
For Position_Applied, you MUST choose one of the positions listed above.
Prioritize matching to "Urgent" positions when the candidate qualifies.
If no position matches well, choose the closest one and reflect it in a lower AI_Score.

IMPORTANT: The resume may be in English or Spanish. Extract information in whatever language it appears. Your structured output fields must always be in English labels but the values can reflect the original resume language for Skills and AI_Summary. For AI_Summary, always write in English regardless of resume language.

parameters.subject: =Application Received - {{ $('Analyzed CVs').item.json.fields['Suggested Position'] }}
parameters.message:
={{ 'Dear ' + $('Analyzed CVs').item.json.fields['Candidate Name'] + ',

Thank you for submitting your application. We have successfully received your resume and it is currently under review.

Our team will contact you within 3-5 business days if your profile matches our current openings.

Best regards,
HR Team' }}

assignments.name: error_message
assignments.value: ={{ $('12 - Enhanced Prepare Sheet Data').item.json.status === 'OK_NO_STORAGE' ? 'Drive upload failed but candidate data saved' : 'Success' }}

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $('Gmail Trigger').item.json.subject }}
parameters.message: Hello,  We received your resume but unfortunately we cannot process DOC/DOCX files.   Could you please resend it in PDF format?  Thank you.
